metadata.title: Lily — Never lose a plant again
metadata.description: Track every plant, never miss a care day. Lily helps you manage your plant collection with care reminders, AI diagnosis, and more.
metadata.ogTitle: Lily — Never lose a plant again
metadata.ogDescription: Smart reminders, AI diagnosis, and care schedules personalized to every plant in your home.

Hero.subheadline: The average plant lover kills 7 plants before giving up. Lily makes sure that never happens to you — with smart reminders, AI diagnosis, and care schedules personalized to every plant in your home.

Features.heading: Everything your plants need
Features.subheading: From identification to daily care, Lily has every tool to keep your green space thriving.
Features.item0Catchline: All your green friends, in one place
Features.item0Description: Organize your entire collection with photos, health status, and care schedules.
Features.item1Catchline: The right care, at the right time
Features.item1Description: Personalized reminders for watering, fertilizing, misting — tailored to each plant.
Features.item2Description: Log any care action in seconds and build a full history for every plant.
Features.item3Description: Identify thousands of species instantly with your camera.
Features.item4Description: Chat with an AI that knows your specific plants — diagnose issues, get advice.
Features.item5Catchline: Grow your skills, not just your plants
Features.item5Description: Unlock badges as you build your care routine and hit new milestones.
Features.item6Catchline: Share your garden with the world
Features.item6Description: Follow other plant lovers and showcase your collection to the community.
Features.item7Description: Group plants by room to track how each environment affects their growth.

Testimonials.heading: Loved by plant people
Testimonials.subheading: Real reviews from the App Store.
Testimonials.quote0: I used to forget to water my plants for weeks at a time. Since using Lily, I haven't lost a single one. The reminders are perfectly timed and it feels like having a plant expert in my pocket.
Testimonials.quote1: The AI diagnosis feature is genuinely impressive. It identified root rot on my monstera before it was obvious to me and gave me a step-by-step recovery plan. Plant saved!
Testimonials.quote2: I've tried every plant app out there. Lily is the only one that actually sticks because the care schedules adapt to each plant individually. My whole collection is thriving.

FAQ.heading: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subheading: Everything you need to know before you start.
FAQ.q0: Is there really no credit card required?
FAQ.a0: Yes, completely. You download the app, start your 7-day free trial, and you're never asked for payment details upfront. You only enter payment info if you choose to subscribe after the trial.
FAQ.q1: What happens when the 7-day trial ends?
FAQ.a1: You'll receive a reminder 3 days before the trial ends. If you choose not to subscribe, your account stays active in read-only mode — you can still view your plant collection and history, you just won't receive new reminders or use the AI features.
FAQ.q2: How is Lily different from Planta or Greg?
FAQ.a2: Lily combines personalized care scheduling, AI plant diagnosis, and social features in one app — without the bloated subscription tiers. Every feature is available from day one, and care schedules are tailored to your specific plant's location and conditions, not just the species defaults.
FAQ.a3: Yes. You manage your subscription directly through App Store or Google Play settings. There are no cancellation fees and you keep access until the end of your billing period.
FAQ.q4: Does Lily work on iPhone and Android?
FAQ.a4: Yes. Lily is available on both iOS (iPhone and iPad) and Android. Your data syncs automatically across all your devices.
FAQ.q5: How accurate is the AI plant diagnosis?
FAQ.a5: The AI is trained on thousands of plant diseases, pests, and care issues. It also has context on your specific plant — its age, care history, and environment — which makes its advice significantly more accurate than generic tools. For rare conditions, it will always recommend consulting a specialist.

Pricing.heading: Simple, honest pricing.
Pricing.trust0: No credit card required to start
Pricing.trust1: Reminder sent 3 days before trial ends
Pricing.trust2: Cancel from App Store / Play Store settings, anytime
Pricing.trust3: Your plant data is yours, forever

Footer.tagline: Track every plant, never miss a care day.

BlogPost.ctaText: Get personalised care reminders and AI-powered diagnosis — free for 7 days, no credit card required.

Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Text: Lily collects information you provide directly, including your name, email address, and plant care data. We also collect usage data to improve the app experience.
Privacy.s2Text: We use your data to provide care reminders, AI plant diagnosis, and personalized recommendations. We never sell your personal data to third parties.
Privacy.s3Text: Your data is stored securely on our servers. Plant photos uploaded for AI diagnosis are processed and not retained beyond what is necessary for the service.
Privacy.s4Text: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us at privacy@withlily.app.
Privacy.s5Text: For privacy-related questions, reach us at
Privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Lily collects, uses, and protects your personal data. Your privacy matters to us.

Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.s1Text: By downloading or using Lily, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the app.
Terms.s2Text: Lily is provided for personal, non-commercial use. You may not use the app to distribute malware, infringe intellectual property rights, or engage in unlawful activities.
Terms.s3Text: Lily offers a 7-day free trial with no credit card required. After the trial, continued use of premium features requires a paid subscription managed through Apple App Store or Google Play. You may cancel at any time; access continues until the end of the billing period.
Terms.s4Text: Lily's AI plant diagnosis is provided for informational purposes only. Always consult a professional horticulturist for critical plant health issues. We are not liable for plant losses resulting from following in-app advice.
Terms.s5Text: For questions about these terms, reach us at
Terms.metaDescription: Read the Terms of Service for Lily, the plant care app. Understand your rights and our policies.
